untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking by 5-year pre-formation weighted-average sales growth (fundamental/accounting metric not in allowed technical indicators). Allowed indicators are technical only (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, z-scores, returns). Fundamental metrics like sales growth require external data source and cross-sectional ranking logic not supported by the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental mean-reversion strategy based on sales growth decile classification. It cannot be translated using only technical indicators. The strategy requires: (1) access to 5-year historical sales data, (2) cross-sectional ranking across all stocks, (3) decile bucketing logic, (4) market cap filtering (top 50%), and (5) annual portfolio rebalancing synchronized to calendar dates. These capabilities require a factor-based portfolio construction framework rather than a per-stock technical signal translator.
